narrative:
Darbyville/Muhlenberg (precinct in Pickaway County) has 631 registered voters, with 51.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.9 percentage points.
